pr.title: Record Submission: 1.1086 BPB - Turbo-Muon + EngramLite + ParamBanking (11L 512d)

output.summary: 11-layer GPT blends Turbo-Muon optimizer, EngramLite hash embeddings, parameter banking, gated U-Net skips, ValueEmbedding, SmearGate, and GPTQ mixed precision.
techniques: Turbo-Muon optimizer with AOL preconditioning, Polar Express coefficients, and row_col normalization
Parameter banking enabling batched Newton-Schulz with gated U-Net skips, ValueEmbedding, and SmearGate
GPTQ mixed-precision int6/int7 with Hessian-driven bit allocation and late QAT
